message:
feat(demo): new screens and major screen enhancements

New screens:
- async_tasks.rs: Async task management demo with spawn/cancel/retry
- drag_drop.rs: Drag and drop interaction demo with keyboard mode

Major enhancements:
- log_search.rs: Comprehensive log search with regex, filtering, context
  lines, vim navigation, and match highlighting (+1142 lines)
- mouse_playground.rs: Full mouse interaction testing with jitter stats,
  event logging, overlay visualization (+1750 lines)
- virtualized_search.rs: Virtualized search with large dataset handling,
  scroll optimization, and search highlighting (+1318 lines)

Updates:
- advanced_text_editor.rs: Editor improvements (+225 lines)
- forms_input.rs: Form input enhancements (+413 lines)
- form_validation.rs: Validation refinements
- macro_recorder.rs: Recorder improvements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
